reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, NO TIENE DUCHAS. En mi caso me toco viajar en moto y pase por ahí.. preguntando, se puede acampar al costado en un campito.. aunque me advirtieron que es propiedad privada, igualmente hay viajeros que lo hacen igual, en mi caso conseguí para tirar la carpa en la casa de Hugo, excelente persona, dueño de una gomería.. mucho paso de camiones.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, NO SHOWERS. In my case, I was traveling by motorcycle and passed by... asking around, I found out you can camp on the side in a small field... although I was warned it's private property, some travelers do it anyway. In my case, I managed to find a place to pitch my tent at Hugo's house, an excellent person who owns a tire shop... lots of truck traffic.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas días, nos alegra que haya tenido una linda experiencia, los esperamos nuevamente ! Saludos cordiales. Equipo YPF

(Translated by Google)
Very well located and the service from the beach attendant was very good, and the shop has delicious coffee and toast.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para un descanso. Las ambuguesas frías, comimos la opción Carré de cerdo con puré y la carne tenía gusto rancio.

(Translated by Google)
Good place for a break. The hamburgers were cold. We had the pork rack with mashed potatoes, and the meat tasted rancid.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Sonia! Lamentamos que hayas tenido esta mala experiencia. Seguiremos trabajando para una mejor atención. Saludos. Equipo YPF
